mapper.select:
SELECT PEG.IDX, T.NAME AS OWNER, PEG.PATH_EX_GROUP_ID AS RESCAN, PEG.PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID AS CHARGE_ID, PEG.PATH_EX_GROUP_NAME AS FILENAME, DATE_FORMAT(PEG.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REGDATE, DATE_FORMAT(PEG.OKDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS OKDATE, PEG.APPROVAL_STATUS, PEG.NOTE, PEG.USER_NO, (select path_ex_flag_name from pi_path_exception_flag WHERE path_ex_flag = PEG.path_ex_flag) FLAG_NAME, PEG.OK_USER_NO FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP AS PEG ,PI_TARGETS AS T WHERE T.TARGET_ID = PEG.TARGET_ID AND PEG.USER_NO = (#{user_no}) AND DATE_FORMAT(PEG.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND T.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{owner},'%')
AND PEG.path_ex_group_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{filename},'%')
AND (PEG.APPROVAL_STATUS IS NULL OR PEG.APPROVAL_STATUS = '')
AND PEG.APPROVAL_STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY PEG.REGDATE DESC, PEG.OKDATE DESC, IDX

SELECT PPE.path_ex, PEG.USER_NO, PEG.path_ex_group_id AS CHARGE_ID FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP AS PEG ,pi_path_exception AS PPE WHERE PPE.path_exception_group_idx = PEG.idx AND PEG.USER_NO = (#{user_no}) AND PEG.idx = #{path_ex_group_id};
mapper.insert:
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) + 1 AS SEQ FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_CHARGE
INSERT INTO PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_CHARGE ( path_ex_charge_name, user_no, ok_user_no, status, REGDATE, OKDATE, REASON, RETURN_REASON, PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID ) VALUES ( CONCAT(#{today}, "_" , #{user_no}, "_" , #{doc_seq}), #{user_no}, #{ok_user_no}, #{apprType}, NOW(), NULL, #{comment}, NULL, #{path_ex_charge_id} )
mapper.select:
SELECT IDX, path_ex_charge_id AS CHARGE_ID, path_ex_charge_name AS NAME, PEC.USER_NO, PU.USER_NAME, PEC.OK_USER_NO, (SELECT Z.USER_NAME FROM PI_USER Z WHERE Z.USER_NO = PEC.ok_user_no) AS OK_USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(PEC.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REGDATE, DATE_FORMAT(PEC.OKDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS OKDATE, PEC.STATUS, PEC.REASON FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_CHARGE AS PEC LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_USER AS PU ON PU.USER_NO = PEC.USER_NO WHERE 1=1
AND PEC.STATUS = #{status}
AND DATE_FORMAT(PEC.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND PU.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_nm},'%')
AND PEC.path_ex_charge_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{path},'%')
AND (PEC.USER_NO = #{user_no} OR PEC.OK_USER_NO = #{user_no})
AND PEC.USER_NO = #{user_no}
ORDER BY PEC.REGDATE DESC, PEC.OKDATE DESC

SELECT PE.path_ex_scope, PE.path_ex, PEG.idx AS group_id, PEC.idx AS charge_id, PEC.path_ex_charge_name AS charge_name FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_CHARGE PEC ,PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP PEG ,PI_PATH_EXCEPTION PE WHERE 1=1 AND PEC.IDX = PEG.PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID AND PEG.IDX = PE.PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP_IDX AND PEG.OK_USER_NO = #{user_no} AND PEC.STATUS = 'W'

SELECT PE.path_ex_scope, PE.path_ex, PE.path_exception_group_idx as group_id, PE.target_id, PEG.user_no FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_CHARGE PEC ,PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP PEG ,PI_PATH_EXCEPTION PE WHERE 1=1 AND PEC.PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID = PEG.PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID AND PEG.IDX = PE.PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP_IDX AND PEC.PATH_EX_CHARGE_ID in
#{charge_id_list}

SELECT PEG.IDX, PE.TARGET_ID, PE.PATH_EX AS PATH, L.LOCATION_ID, PEG.PATH_EX_GROUP_ID AS RESCAN FROM PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP AS PEG ,PI_PATH_EXCEPTION AS PE ,PI_TARGETS T ,PI_LOCATIONS L WHERE 1=1 AND PEG.IDX = PE.PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP_IDX AND T.TARGET_ID = PEG.TARGET_ID AND T.GROUP_ID = L.GROUP_ID AND T.TARGET_ID = L.TARGET_ID AND L.DESCRIPTION = 'All local files' AND PEG.IDX IN
#{group_list}
mapper.update:
UPDATE PI_PATH_EXCEPTION_GROUP PEG SET PEG.PATH_EX_GROUP_ID = 1 WHERE PEG.IDX IN
#{group_list}
mapper.select: SELECT T.NAME FROM PI_TARGETS T WHERE T.TARGET_ID = #{apply_to} AND T.AP_NO = #{status}
SELECT AP.NETWORK FROM PI_AP_SERVER AP WHERE AP.ap_no = #{status}

SELECT A.FILTER_ID, A.AP_NO, A.NETWORK, A.TARGET_ID, CASE WHEN A.TARGET_ID IS NULL AND A.NAME IS NULL THEN 'All Targets' WHEN A.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL THEN A.GROUP_NM WHEN A.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.NAME IS NULL THEN 'Deleted Target' ELSE NAME END AS NAME, A.TYPE, A.PATH, A.CREATE_USER, A.USER_NAME, A.CREDATE, A.REGDATE, A.REGEXPFLAG, A.COMMENT FROM (SELECT G.FILTER_ID, G.AP_NO, AP.NETWORK, G.TARGET_ID, T.NAME, G.TYPE, PG.GROUP_ID, PG.NAME AS GROUP_NM, CAST(AES_DECRYPT(path,'PICenterTree119@') AS CHAR(500)) AS PATH,
G.CREATE_USER, U.USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(G.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREDATE, DATE_FORMAT(G.REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REGDATE, G.REGEXPFLAG, G.COMMENT FROM pi_global_filters G LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_targets T ON G.TARGET_ID = T.TARGET_ID AND G.AP_NO = T.AP_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN pi_user U ON G.CREATE_USER = U.USER_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PI_GROUPALL PG ON G.TARGET_ID = PG.GROUP_ID ,pi_ap_server AP WHERE G.AP_NO = AP.AP_NO AND G.FILTER_USE = 'Y' ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.AP_NO = #{status}
AND A.TARGET_ID IS NULL AND A.NAME IS NULL
AND A.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.NAME IS NULL
AND A.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
AND A.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{user_name},'%')
AND A.PATH LIKE CONCAT('%',#{path},'%')
AND A.CREDATE BETWEEN CONCAT(#{fromDate},' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{toDate},' 23:59:59')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_global_filters (filter_id, target_id, ap_no, type, path, create_user, credate, regdate, comment, regExpFlag, filter_use) VALUES (#{filter_id}, #{target_id}, #{ap_no}, #{type}, AES_ENCRYPT(#{path_ex}, #{key}), #{create_user}, NOW(), NOW(), #{comment}, #{regExp} ,'Y')
